name: pastevector
description: Paste ChemDraw and other clipboard vector content into Markdown by writing SVG or PNG files and inserting Markdown image links.

pasteVector.destinationTemplate.description: Output path template, relative to the current document directory.

pasteVector.preferBackend.description: Linux clipboard backend selection. auto prefers Wayland when available, otherwise X11.

pasteVector.altText.description: Alt text used when inserting the Markdown image.

pasteVector.showLog.description: Show the pasteVector output channel while the command runs.

pasteVector.copyMarkdownToClipboard.description: Also copy the inserted Markdown image link to the VS Code clipboard.

pasteVector.finalizeSvgWithInkscape.description: Run Inkscape on pasted SVG text to fit the canvas and save as plain SVG. Does not affect EMF conversion (use pasteVector.fitSvgPageWithInkscape for that).

pasteVector.windowsDisplayScalePercent.description: Windows display scale percentage (e.g. 125 for 125%). After EMF→SVG conversion the root SVG size is multiplied by 100/windowsDisplayScalePercent. Set to 100 to disable correction.

pasteVector.fitSvgPageWithInkscape.description: After emf2svg-conv conversion, run a single Inkscape pass to fit the page canvas to the drawing. Has no effect if Inkscape is not in PATH or if emfConverter is set to inkscape.

pasteVector.showBackendDiagnostics.description: Log scale percent, computed factor, fit step result, and backend stderr to the pasteVector output channel for debugging EMF conversion.

pasteVector.atomLabelFontSizePt.description: (Deprecated, no longer used.) Target font size in pt for atom labels in ChemDraw EMF drawings.

pasteVector.bondLengthPt.description: (Deprecated, no longer used.) Target bond length in pt for label-free ChemDraw EMF drawings.

pasteVector.usePowerPointForEmf.description: (Deprecated, no longer used.) Previously enabled PowerPoint COM automation for EMF conversion.

pasteVector.inkscapeEmfScaleFactor.description: (Deprecated, use pasteVector.windowsDisplayScalePercent instead.) Multiplicative scale factor applied after Inkscape EMF conversion.

pasteVector.powerPointTimeoutMs.description: (Deprecated, no longer used.) Timeout for the PowerPoint COM automation script.
